description: Implement the Train mandate correctly: (1) Change the +1 coin bonus to a -1 cost DISCOUNT for issuer/ally when buying cards, (2) Change resolution order so issuer goes FIRST then clockwise by seating order (turnOrder), (3) Auto-open the SeasonCardsModal when it is a player's turn to train, (4) Cards the player cannot afford should appear disabled/dimmed and not be clickable, (5) Clicking an affordable card shows a confirmation popup before buying. Also add state field lastMandateIssuerId to track who played the last mandate turn for politics turn order in subsequent seasons.
steps: In src/types/game.ts GameState interface: Add 'lastMandateIssuerId: string | null' field. Add 'trainDiscount: boolean' field to track whether the current train resolution player gets a discount (issuer or ally).

In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, function executeTrain(): Remove the +1 coin bonus to issuer/ally. Instead, set up the resolution order as: [issuerId, ...clockwise from next seat after issuer]. The clockwise seating order is turnOrder (which is fixed from game start based on initial honor, highest first). So the issuer goes first, then we continue clockwise from the player sitting to the issuer's LEFT in turnOrder.

In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, function buySeasonCard(): Apply a -1 discount to the card cost when the buyer is issuer or ally (check via trainMandateIssuerId and allies). The cost can go to 0 (free) but not negative.
In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, function createInitialGameState(): Initialize lastMandateIssuerId to null.
In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, function chooseMandateTile(): Set state.lastMandateIssuerId = playerId when a mandate is chosen (this tracks who played the last mandate turn this season).
In src/store/gameStore.ts: Add 'showTrainModal: boolean' to the store interface, default false. Add 'setShowTrainModal: (show: boolean) => void' action.

In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx: Make the modal interactive during Train mandate. When trainMandateActive is true: (a) cards the player cannot afford appear with a 'disabled' class (dimmed, not clickable), (b) affordable cards show a buy button, (c) clicking buy shows a confirmation dialog/popup asking 'Confirm purchase of [card name] for [cost] coins?' with Confirm/Cancel buttons. Apply the -1 discount visually when the player is issuer or ally.

In src/components/PoliticsTrack.tsx or GameBoard.tsx: Auto-open the SeasonCardsModal when trainMandateActive becomes true and it is the current player's turn. Use a useEffect that watches gameState.trainMandateActive and gameState.currentPlayerIndex.
In src/components/ActionPanel.tsx: When trainMandateActive, include a button to open the season cards modal manually (in case the player closes it).
Update i18n/en.ts and i18n/es.ts with new translation keys for confirmation popup text and discount labels.
acceptance_criteria: Running 'npx tsc -b && npx vite build' passes without errors.
Train mandate resolution order: issuer first, then clockwise by seating (turnOrder).
Issuer and ally get -1 discount on card cost (minimum 0) instead of +1 coin bonus.
SeasonCardsModal auto-opens during train for the active player.
Cards too expensive appear dimmed and are not clickable.
Confirmation popup appears before finalizing a purchase.
lastMandateIssuerId is set whenever a mandate is chosen.
